title: How AI Is Transforming Company Formation and Small Business Creation in the UK
description: The process of starting a business has undergone significant changes over the past decade. What once involved paperwork, postal correspondence, and lengthy waiting periods can now often be completed entirely online within hours. As artificial intelligence continues to reshape industries worldwide, the company formation sector is also experiencing... Read the full article on TechBullion.

title: Microsoft makes big AI inroads in China by selling OpenAI models
description: The tech giant counts ByteDance, Ant Group, Meituan and Tencent Holdings among its Chinese customers.

title: SKYPXL - AI appointed as FEIMA ROBOTICS Australian Master Dealer
Gen Z Emerges as Most Skeptical Yet Heavy Users of AI Chatbots, Pew Report Finds
description: A new Pew Research Center poll reveals a complex relationship between young Americans and AI. While Gen Z is the most likely age group to have used a chatbot, they are simultaneously the most likely to believe AI will have a negative impact on society and their personal lives in the coming decades. The report highlights concerns about job displacement, reliability, and the influence of technology, even as usage climbs among younger generations.

title: AI glasses race turns into a battle of devices, LLMs, and user interfaces
description: AI glasses are gaining momentum as Meta, Rokid, RayNeo, Xreal, Viture, HTC, and other vendors step up their efforts, with Google and Samsung Electronics expected to enter the market in the second half of 2026. The category is widely seen as a potential essential mobile device after the smartphone.
